extraction.one_line_summary: NARVÁEZ escaped from a 14-rider break inside final 15km after PADUN suffered mechanical with broken front wheel, winning by 1:08.
tactical_patterns: NTT isolated GC riders by sending SUNDERLAND pacing inside 50km, forcing POZZOVIVO's attack despite team isolation.
NARVÁEZ exploited PADUN mechanical at 15km to go rather than attacking directly, revealing breakaway patience beats aggression.
ALMEIDA's team cotton-wool tactics maintained 34s lead despite eight-minute loss, showing calculated stage abandonment for GC preservation.

rider_signals.NARVÁEZ Jhonatan: positive: Won tactical battle without needing to attack, showing maturity at 23 to wait for mechanical rather than force.
rider_signals.PADUN Mark: negative: Broken front wheel on final climb cost probable stage win, but 9-second chase showed strong climbing legs.
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: negative: Attacked final climb despite team isolation, revealing desperation rather than strength, gained nothing on GC.
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: Team-protected all stage, finished 8+ minutes down but defended 34s GC lead, showing tactical discipline.
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: negative: Lost significant time to GC group, dropping from top-10 contention.
rider_signals.PERNSTEINER Hermann: negative: Lost significant time to GC group, indicating fade from earlier race position.
